Product Details
DH Dust Seals

Dust-excluding sealing elements designed to protect hydraulic rods and cylinders from external contamination.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

DH Dust Seals

A practical wiper-style sealing profile that helps extend cylinder life by keeping contaminants out.

CHX DH Dust Seals are used at rod-entry positions to remove dust and surface contaminants before they enter hydraulic assemblies, supporting cleaner operation and improved sealing reliability.

Contamination Exclusion

Helps block dust, mud, and foreign particles from entering the cylinder structure.

Rod Protection

Protects rod surfaces and internal seals by reducing abrasive contamination at the entry point.

Hydraulic Compatibility

Can be selected for hydraulic cylinders and reciprocating assemblies with matching groove standards.
